extDescription.message: Download and watch YouTube videos offline using yt-dlp + Native Messaging.

commErrorReload.message: Communication error. Please reload the page.

extensionUpdatedReload.message: The extension has been updated. Please reload the page.

extensionUpdatedReloadF5.message: The extension has been updated. Please reload (F5) the page.

noVideosDesc.message: Click "Save Offline" on a YouTube video page to download it

noPlaylistsMsg.message: No playlists. Create a playlist first.

serverConnectError.message: Cannot connect to server. Please reinstall the native host.

videoLoadError.message: Failed to load video. The file may not exist.

errNetworkDisconnected.message: Connection was lost during download. Please try again later.

errDnsError.message: Cannot connect to the network. Check your internet connection or configure proxy in config.json if needed.

errConnectionRefused.message: Connection to server was refused. Please try again later.

errTimeout.message: Connection timed out. The network may be unstable. Please try again later.

setupNotConnected.message: Not connected — Native host is not installed or not running.

setupWindowsStep1.message: Open the native-host folder in File Explorer

setupWindowsStep3.message: Follow the on-screen prompts to complete installation

setupMacLinuxStep1.message: Open a terminal in the native-host folder

setupMacLinuxStep3.message: Follow the on-screen prompts to complete installation

setupAfterInstall.message: After installation, click "Check Connection" to verify.
